flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Northland College are 20% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($44.6k vs $55.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northland College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 (73.2% → 31.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northland College fell 48% between 2021 and 2024 (520 → 269).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Northland College fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (52.8% → 37.9%).
